adds.rationale: Quantum is the only named next-wave with zero watchlist representation; three concrete Q3 2023 milestones — Google's surface-code error-correction scaling in Nature, IBM's qLDPC codes needing ~10x fewer physical qubits, and IonQ's $25.5M Air Force Research Lab contract — confirm credible early buildup, and QTUM (launched September 2018) provides diversified ETF exposure with five years of history.

news_evidence.summary: Google Quantum AI published 'Suppressing quantum errors by scaling a surface code logical qubit' in Nature, showing more physical qubits reduce logical error rates — the scaling premise for fault tolerance.
IBM researchers posted qLDPC fault-tolerant memory codes requiring ~one-tenth the physical qubits of current surface codes, lowering the overhead threshold to fault tolerance.
IonQ announced a $25.5M AFRL contract to deploy two trapped-ion systems for quantum networking — its largest government contract to date and first DoD-installation deployment.

removes.rationale: SPY provides only passive broad-market beta with no wave-thesis alignment; with four AI large-caps already supplying market exposure, SPY is the one non-thematic slot in a full 8/8 watchlist, and displacing it for QTUM closes the last named next-wave gap.

news_evidence.summary: The Fed held the funds rate at 5.25-5.50% on Sep 20, 2023 and signaled higher-for-longer, compressing the premium on broad passive index exposure relative to early-stage thematic holds.
Fortune reported the S&P 500 'suffered a rough September' as rising yields erased the summer rally; SPY's Q3 underperformance vs thematic holds reduces its marginal contribution.

rationale_overall: One thematically targeted swap: SPY out, QTUM in. The thesis names quantum as a likely next wave, but the watchlist had zero quantum exposure. Three Q3 2023 milestones (Google's Nature error-correction result, IBM's qLDPC paper, IonQ's $25.5M AFRL contract) confirm active buildup with government/research validation — entry-before-surge timing. SPY is displaced as the only non-thematic slot. Post-change, all four named next-waves have a representative — RKLB, BOTZ, QTUM, URA — keeping the AI bucket intact.
